Large bitternut in the field edge
2 Young Branch Dr, Middletown, MD 21769, USA

Planted by The REED Center as part of a DNR grant in partnership with SilvoCulture. This is a thicket forming plum that is designed to act as a buffer for the stream bank. These plums tend to be prolific and fast growing. These are from suckered root cuttings
